scripts.dev:back: cd server && uv run --package server --with 'uvicorn[standard]' python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 3101 --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run dev:back
scripts.test:paipan: uv run --package paipan pytest -n auto -q paipan/tests/
scripts.test:server: uv run --package server pytest -n auto -q server/tests/
scripts.test: npm run test:paipan && npm run test:server && npm run test:frontend
